title: Letter to the Editor: Fossil fuel companied must be held accountable
description: Dear Editor, Every time a climate disaster hits, we see the same story. Families lose homes, roads are washed out, and taxpayers foot the bill, all while oil and gas companies rake in profits. Fossil fuel corporations knew about the climate crisis for decades and continue to mislead the public. They’re getting richer off our [...]
